methodology_note: The author's methodology is to present mutashabihat (similarities) in a poetic, mnemonic format. Each entry identifies a specific word or phrase and then enumerates its occurrences across different surahs, often highlighting variations or specific contexts, primarily for memorization.
example_entries: 203 - (وَرَبُّكَ الْغَنِيُّ) فِي الأنْعَامِ ... (ذُو الرَّحْمَةِ) الْبَاقِي عَلَى الدَّوَامِ
204 - (وَأَهْلُهَا) يَا صَاحِ (غَافِلُونَا) ... فِيهَا وَقُلْ فِي هُودِ (مُصْلِحُونَا)
profiler_notes: The book is entirely a poetic composition (nazm) designed for memorization, not prose. Entries are identified by headings or the word/phrase itself, followed by poetic lines explaining the mutashabihat. No explicit Quranic verse numbers are provided, only surah names and relative positions.

_meta.book_title: هداية المرتاب وغاية الحفاظ والطلاب في تبيين متشابه الكتاب
_meta.author: علي بن محمد بن عبد الصمد الهمداني المصري الشافعي،أبو الحسن،علم الدين السخاوي(ت 643هـ)
